---
title: "Pre-frontal stimulation does not reliably increase reward responsiveness"
authors: "Hadden, L. M., Penny, H., Jones, A. L., Partridge, A. M., Lancaster, T. M., & Allen, C."
year: 2023
date: 2023-01-01
pub-journal: "Cortex"
volume: "159"
pages: "268–285"
doi: "10.1016/j.cortex.2022.11.011"
pdf: "assets/papers/2023/haddenetal2023.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
